The recurrent model averages 53.11 across LAMBADA and the reasoning suite.
Clone the repo and build the environment The official PyTorch implementation ships with a Dockerfile, training scripts, and the lit_gpt model definitions.
The recurrent average is 29.88 and the hybrid average is 42.28.
It introduces a channel-wise erase gate bt ∈ [0,1]dk on the key axis.
It also introduces a channel-wise write gate wt ∈ [0,1]dv on the value axis.
On language modeling and commonsense reasoning, Gated DeltaNet-2 has the best average in both settings.

NVIDIA AI Releases Gated DeltaNet-2: A Linear Attention Layer That Decouples Erase and Write in the Delta Rule Linear attention replaces the unbounded KV cache of softmax attention with a fixed-size recurrent state.
NVIDIA releases Gated DeltaNet-2: linear attention with channel-wise erase and write gates, outperforming KDA and Mamba-3 at 1.3B.
It outperforms Mamba-2, Gated DeltaNet, KDA, and Mamba-3 across the researchs benchmark suite.
